required_preferences.fact: Begins a nightly pre-bed CPAP routine, strictly avoids all reading (including physical books) after 9pm and instead practices guided breathing or calming music without screens or reading materials

supersedes.fact: Performs a nightly digital detox: reads physical books in bed, never uses screens

required_preferences.fact: Schedules all veterinary visits for her cat solely based on her own availability, arranging transport and logistics without help from her partner

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly veterinary visits for her cat, coordinating with her partner to ensure coverage and minimize disruption to work and leisure plans

required_preferences.fact: Uses shared digital checklists to track migration progress and ensure compliance with revised deployment protocols
Prioritizes security documentation over speed for all feature launches, referencing regulatory checklists
Chooses local indie coffee shops for weekend reading — never visits big chains
Celebrates major project milestones with informal team lunches for her direct reports, a practice new to the expanded team

persona: A mid-career backend developer at a fintech startup
